title: thelysia grandiflora
intro: Thelysia grandiflora, also known as the giant thelysia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Compositae. It is a shrub-like plant with large flowers that is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelysia grandiflora include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Thelysia grandiflora include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are often used to make teas, tonics, and supplements.
